water.name: Rock Creek in the Hat Creek Drainage

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(121) — Rock Creek in the Hat Creek Drainage (Shasta Co.)
sources.quotedText: (121) Rock Creek in the Hat Creek Drainage (Shasta Co.) from Rock Creek spring (origin) downstream to Baum Lake.  Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
Hat Creek Waterways — Shasta Land Trust
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Spring layer record for gaz_id 265514, "Rock Spring", Spring, Shasta County, CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":265514,"gaz_name":"Rock Spring","gaz_featureclass":"Spring","fcode":45800,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Shasta"}; geometry (Web Mercator -13529121.1273, 5000614.2833) converts to lon -121.534163, lat 40.920444 — the spring named as this reach's origin per CCR §7.50(b)(121) ("Rock Creek spring (origin) downstream to Baum Lake"), about 2.3 km from Baum Lake's own GNIS point (-121.545081, 40.938780). Corrects the prior file coordinates (-121.6340, 40.9280), which were off by ~8.4 km from this location near Cassel.

parameters.note: Rock Creek in the Hat Creek Drainage, from Rock Creek spring (origin) downstream to Baum Lake, is closed to all fishing all year. This short spring-fed reach near Cassel supports habitat for the state- and federally-endangered Shasta crayfish.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year, from Rock Creek spring (origin) downstream to Baum Lake
regulations.verbatimText: from Rock Creek spring (origin) downstream to Baum Lake.  Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. This water is closed to all fishing all year, so the license requirement is moot here, but is included for statewide-standard completeness.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
